articles.title: Ethereum’s staking rewards rate hits post-Merge record high, fueled by memecoin frenzy
articles.description: With the surge in on-chain gas fees driven by the most recent memecoin frenzy, the staking reward rate on Ethereum reached a post-Merge all-time high.

articles.title: Is Pepe (PEPE) Price Correction Complete After 66% Decrease?
articles.description: The Pepe (PEPE) price finally reached a local top after a 2400% increase.
